---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem
What problem does this feature solve? What's the pain point?

## Proposed Solution
Describe your ideal solution clearly.

## Alternatives Considered
Have you considered other approaches? Why is this one preferred?

## Hardware Constraints
Does this feature require specific hardware? (e.g., GPU, minimum VRAM)

## Additional Context
Any mockups, references, or related issues.
